fields.summary: Build Master Job Module for MaWo Application
[Umbrella] MaWo - A Master Worker framework on top of YARN Services

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.
status.name: Open

issuetype.description: A new feature of the product, which has yet to be developed.
issuetype.name: New Feature

fields.description:
A job in MaWo application is a collection of Tasks. A Job consists of a setup task, a list of tasks and a teardown task. 
 * JobBuilder
 ** SimpleTaskJobBuilder : SimpleJobBuilder should be able to parse simpleJobdescription file. In this file format, each line is considered as Task
 ** SimpleTaskJsonJobBuilder: Utility to parse json job description file.
